hero.headline: Expert Auto Mechanic Services You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, our certified technicians deliver quality workmanship and transparent pricing. Your car is in safe hands.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair & Maintenance
featureSections.body: At King Auto Repair, we handle everything from oil changes to engine overhauls. Our state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment and ASE-certified mechanics ensure your vehicle runs smoothly and safely.
featureSections.cardBody: We provide detailed estimates before any work begins, so you know exactly what to expect. No hidden fees, no surprises.

featureSections.title: Only the Best Parts & Fluids
featureSections.body: We use OEM and high-quality aftermarket parts to ensure longevity and performance. Our partnership with leading suppliers means we get the best components at competitive prices.
featureSections.cardBody: All repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty for your peace of mind.

servicesPage.intro: At King Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle running at its best. Our certified technicians use advanced diagnostics and quality parts to ensure reliable, long-lasting results.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Expert brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and more to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. At King Auto Repair, we perform thorough brake inspections and use premium parts for replacements and repairs. Whether you need new pads, rotors, calipers, or brake fluid flush, our technicians ensure your brakes perform flawlessly.
benefits: Peace of mind with a 12-month warranty

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check brake pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid levels using specialized tools.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We provide a detailed report with options and pricing so you can make an informed decision.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We install quality parts and test the brakes on the road to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles depending on driving habits and vehicle type. We recommend an inspection at every oil change.

faqs.question: What are signs my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squealing or grinding noises, a pulsating brake pedal, longer stopping distances, or a warning light on your dashboard.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for check engine lights, performance issues, and more.
services.longDescription: Modern vehicles rely on complex computer systems. Our advanced diagnostic equipment pinpoints issues quickly and accurately. From minor sensor replacements to major engine repairs, we have the expertise to restore your engine's performance and efficiency.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money

process.title: Scan & Analyze
process.description: We connect our diagnostic scanner to read error codes and live data from your engine's computer.

process.title: Inspect & Verify
process.description: We perform visual inspections and tests to confirm the root cause of the issue.

process.title: Repair & Clear Codes
process.description: We make the necessary repairs, clear the codes, and test drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be something simple like a loose gas cap or more serious like an oxygen sensor or catalytic converter issue. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: Can you fix engine misfires?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can diagnose and repair misfires caused by spark plugs, ignition coils, fuel injectors, or compression issues.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and preventive maintenance services.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the best way to extend your engine's life. King Auto Repair offers synthetic and conventional oil changes, plus comprehensive maintenance checks including fluid levels, belts, hoses, and filters. We follow manufacturer recommendations to keep your warranty intact.
benefits: Complimentary multi-point inspection with every oil change

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the oil filter, and refill with the correct grade and quantity of oil.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check other fluids, belts, hoses, tires, and lights as part of our courtesy inspection.

process.title: Reset & Record
process.description: We reset your oil life monitor and provide a sticker with your next service due date.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Conventional oil: every 3,000-5,000 miles. Synthetic oil: every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual for specifics.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both conventional and synthetic oil options. We recommend synthetic for newer vehicles and extreme climates.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable year-round with expert AC and heating diagnostics and repair.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning HVAC system can make driving miserable. Our technicians are trained to diagnose and repair air conditioning and heating issues, from refrigerant leaks to blower motor failures. We restore your cabin comfort quickly and reliably.
benefits: Improved air quality with cabin filter replacement

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor operation, hoses, and electrical components.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: Using UV dye and electronic detectors, we find and repair refrigerant leaks.

process.title: Service & Recharge
process.description: We repair or replace faulty parts, evacuate and recharge the system to manufacturer specs.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We'll diagnose and fix it.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years or if you notice reduced cooling performance.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Auto Repair Shop Since 2009
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe on the road. We believe in transparency, craftsmanship, and treating every customer like family.
story: King Auto Repair was founded in 2009 by master mechanic John King with a simple vision: create an auto shop where customers receive fair prices and expert work without the hassle. Starting with just two bays in a small Dallas garage, John's commitment to integrity and quality quickly earned a loyal following. Word spread, and the shop expanded to serve drivers across the city.

Today, King Auto Repair operates a state-of-the-art facility with five bays and a team of ASE-certified technicians. We continue to invest in the latest diagnostic tools and training to service all makes and models. Despite our growth, we maintain the same customer-first values that started it all: honesty, quality, and respect.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our transparent pricing and detailed explanations build lasting trust.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: Every repair is performed to the highest standard using quality parts and proven techniques.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local events and charities because Dallas is our home too.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We regularly train our team and update equipment to stay ahead of automotive technology.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with King Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to book your service or have a question? Call us or fill out the form below.
